items.title: MLflow & W&B tooling
items.description: MLflow and Weights & Biases provide APIs for run IDs, tags, run comparison UIs, and model registry workflows—the concrete tools that implement the versioning concepts defined here.

items.title: Tracking metrics
items.description: Metrics logged during training attach to a run ID; comparing runs only works when metric names and evaluation protocols are logged consistently on each versioned experiment.

items.title: Reproducibility and seeds
items.description: Versioning records which run produced a model; reproducibility requires logging seeds, data snapshots, and code commits as params or tags on that same run ID.

items.title: Training and inference
items.description: Each training job that creates a versioned run eventually loads a registered artifact for inference; deployment should reference registry version and source run ID.
